publishedUrlRules: Use the real platform URL if publicly available.
For WeChat private chat/manual outreach, do not invent a URL; put evidence notes without private identifiers.
Never use placeholder URLs as publishedUrl.

metricRules.views: Real platform views only; 0 if unavailable.
metricRules.clicks: Real tracked or observed clicks only; 0 if unavailable.
metricRules.revenue: Actual paid revenue only; 0 if none.

evidenceFieldRules: Evidence can be screenshot filename, public URL, timestamped note, or manually recorded non-secret observation.
Do not include cookies, tokens, passwords, private phone numbers, or private user identifiers.
backfillApplyForbiddenConditions: missing real publishedUrl/evidence for public channels
user has not explicitly approved apply
userNextCodexInstruction: After filling real results, ask Codex to run check-ebos-external-publish-results and backfill-ebos-external-channel-data dry-run for 2026-07-03. Do not request --apply unless hasRealSignals=true and canBackfill=true.
warnings: No real signals exist yet; keep externalPublishingStatus=waiting_real_data.
